title: WindroseCommand
description:
WindroseCommand: Command that, when executed with the LadybugToolsAdapter, generates a windrose from the epw file using the given parameters.
Outputs a string file path if the OutputLocation is given, or the base64 string representation of the image if no path is given.

EPWFile.description: The path to an EPW file. FileSettings: The fileSettings, file name and directory, to use with an adapter for push and pull

AnalysisPeriod.description: The analysis period to use for plotting, default to whole non-leap year.

NumberOfDirectionBins.description: The number of directional bins to plot on the windrose.

ColourMap.description: A Matplotlib colour map. Corresponds to the 'cmap' parameter of plot methods. See https://matplotlib.org/stable/users/explain/colors/colormaps.html for examples of valid keys. Default of 'viridis'.

OutputLocation.description: Full file path (with file name) to save the plot to. Leave blank to output a base 64 string representation of the image instead.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
